summary: Frontend-only verification of the new /scheduling module (Task 13). Drove the live preview as admin@ccms.app and exercised every data-testid in the review-request matrix. 16/18 review items PASS. 1 not-exercised (cancel-flow: only scheduled-status appt could not be created in this run; UI components are code-verified present). 1 blocked-by-env (clinic-hours-aware Day rendering — POST /api/clinic-profiles returns 422 with an empty body for the payload shape derived from public docs; the testing note pointed to /app/memory/CHANGELOG.md Task-9 smoke for the exact schema, which was not attached). All other paths (redirects, view toggles, prev/next/today step sizes, range labels, week/month/year cell counts, week-add prefill at 09:00, day-slot prefill at slot time, day fallback 52 slots + no-hours notice, outside-window banner + expand-btn, BookDialog field set, sidebar single-Scheduling entry, AND the critical /counts-vs-/appointments network routing) are fully green.

minor.issue: Returned 422 with EMPTY response body for the payload {location_id, timezone:'UTC', hours:[{day,open,close,closed}*7]}. An empty body on a 422 is unhelpful — the FastAPI default is to return a JSON detail array; this looks like a custom handler swallowing it, or the schema name/shape differs from the documented payload. Blocks any UI-side smoke that needs to seed a clinic profile.

issues: The scheduling-week-add-* (+) button is hover-revealed (opacity-0 → opacity-100 on hover/focus). For a11y/discoverability consider rendering a thin always-visible variant or focus ring; hover-only affordances are invisible to keyboard / touch users.

action_items: Provide the exact POST /api/clinic-profiles payload (or a sample curl from /app/memory/CHANGELOG.md Task 9) so the clinic-hours-aware Day view (Mon 56 slots / Sat closed banner) can be smoke-tested end-to-end. The route returned 422 with an empty body for the natural payload shape.
(Nice-to-have) Have the 422 handler return its detail array so future test agents can self-correct payload shape without backend log access.
(Nice-to-have, P3) Make scheduling-week-add-* at least focus-visible without hover (currently opacity-0 → 100 on cell hover).

Re-test the cancel flow next iteration with a freshly-created scheduled appointment — the only existing seed appt (TESTCachePat on Apr 22) is already status=cancelled, so the SchedulingPage correctly routes its click to goToDay(...) instead of openReschedule(...). UI is wired (alertdialog testids confirmed in SchedulingPage.jsx lines 170-190); just couldn't be exercised with the current seed.
critical_code_review_comments: SchedulingPage.jsx onOpenAppointment branch silently downgrades cancelled appts to a day-jump — that's correct, but consider also showing a toast like 'Appointment is cancelled' so users don't think the click did nothing.

useScheduling.js fetches /appointments only on Day view (good). Confirmed via network capture: Day → /appointments?from=&to=, Month → /appointments/counts, Year → /appointments/counts (1y range, include_samples=0). Routing is exactly per the Task 10 perf guarantee.
BookDialog appt-start datetime-local value uses local-time format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM (no seconds). Verified prefill matches both week-add (09:00) and day-slot (HH:MM from cell testid). Looks correct.

DayView outside-window banner copy reads '1 appointment outside the configured 07:00-20:00 window are hidden.' — minor grammar nit ('1 appointment ... are hidden' should be 'is hidden'); pluralisation only kicks in at >1.

success_rate.frontend: 16/18 review items verified end-to-end (89%); 1 not exercised (cancel happy-path needs scheduled appt seed); 1 env-blocked (clinic-profile POST 422)

test_credentials: admin@ccms.app / Admin@ComplianceClinic1 — works. /api/auth/reauth with the same password returns 200 + reauth_token (length 187).
seed_data_creation: None. Did not create any persistent appointments or profiles. Attempted clinic-profile POST returned 422 (no rows created). Pre-existing TESTCachePat appointment on Apr 22 11:19 PM was used for outside-window verification only — not modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scheduling module is solidly green from the frontend side. Two follow-ups carry forward: (a) clinic-profile POST schema — once main agent shares the exact payload, re-run the Mon 56-slot / Sat closed-banner check; the useClinicHours hook already correctly fetches /api/clinic-profiles/{location_id} on page mount (verified in network log), so a successful POST + page reload should immediately flip the Day view's grid bounds. (b) Cancel-confirmation alertdialog (scheduling-cancel-confirm + scheduling-cancel-confirm-btn) — wire a fresh scheduled appt via POST /api/appointments first, then click its preview, then click appt-cancel-appointment-btn. Note: route capture confirms Week/Month/Year views ALL use /api/appointments/counts and Day uses /api/appointments — Task 10 perf contract is honoured.
rca of the issue: POST /api/clinic-profiles 422 with empty body: probable causes are (1) field-name mismatch (e.g. 'timezone' vs 'tz', 'hours' vs 'weekly_hours', 'open' vs 'open_time'), (2) day enum case (capital 'Monday' vs lowercase 'monday'), or (3) closed-day shape (closed:true with open/close=null vs '00:00'). Repro: fetch('/api/clinic-profiles', POST, x-reauth-token=<reauth>, body=<payload above>). Mitigation for testing: temporarily emit the validation detail array in the 422 response so test agents can self-correct, OR ship the canonical payload in /app/memory/CHANGELOG.md alongside the existing smoke script reference.
